zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行趋势
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持震荡偏强格局，价格站稳1770均线上方，并逼近1792高点，短线多头动能仍在延续但上攻略显放缓，结构健康短线

MACD指标维持正值并向上扩散，显示多头动能占优，但RSI数据缺失导致超买判断有限，短期需观察动量延续性信号偏强，但需谨慎性

下方支撑位关注1770附近均线与1750区域，上方阻力集中于1792前高，若有效突破将打开1805至1820空间区间震荡为主

操作上建议短线回踩分批做多，止损可设1765下方，或等待放量突破1792确认趋势延续，避免追高风险，控制仓位并观察信号确认

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum vs USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase after a modest 0.30% daily gain, with price action hovering near 1791. The structure suggests short-term neutrality leaning bullish, as price remains above the 20-period SMA at 1770.45. This positioning indicates buyers are maintaining control, but momentum lacks strong expansion. Market participants appear to be awaiting a catalyst for directional breakout from the current narrow range.

MACD positive 5.135 shows strengthening bullish momentum in the short-term framework. Although RSI data is unavailable, price behavior suggests a balanced state rather than overbought conditions. The market is likely consolidating gains after recent upside movement, with volatility compressing. Such setups often precede expansion phases when directional conviction returns to the market participants. Sustained closes above SMA may reinforce bullish bias.

Price action establishes immediate support at 1783.34, aligned with the 24-hour low, while stronger structural support resides near the 20-period SMA at 1770.45. On the upside, resistance is observed at 1792.3, followed by a psychological barrier at 1800. A sustained breakout above this zone could trigger renewed buying interest and extend the current bullish structure into higher ranges. Failure to hold support may shift bias neutral.

Traders may consider a range-bound strategy between 1783 and 1792 given the current compression. Long positions are better supported on confirmed breakout above 1792.3 with volume confirmation, targeting the 1800 level and beyond. Conversely, rejection at resistance favors short-term mean reversion trades back toward SMA support. Risk management remains essential, with stops placed below 1783.34 to avoid breakdown exposure in volatile conditions.
